steps.title: Read two points from the line of best fit
steps.content: From the scatterplot, the line of best fit appears to pass through the points (0, 30.4) and (2, 60.6) (values read directly from the graph).

steps.title: Find the y-intercept and match to choices
steps.content:
Using point $(0,30.4)$: $$b = y - mx = 30.4 - 15.12 \cdot 0 = 30.4 \approx 30.38$$
Thus the linear model is $$y = 30.38 + 15.12x$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
